title: Contract Tests, Race and Leak Checks, Chaos, and Release · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a production Go messaging defense dossier with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a production Go messaging defense dossier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test pure policy, envelope schema, topology routes, publisher confirms, consumer effects, disposable broker integration, and production probes at distinct layers; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Inject return, nack, channel close, heartbeat loss, blocked connection, duplicate, poison, dependency timeout, majority loss, restart, stale generation, race, and goroutine-leak failures.

Roll out schema, topology, publisher, consumer, policy, and broker changes in a compatibility-safe order with shadow evidence and rollback; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Layered Test Strategy
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 6789 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate release on contracts, race and leak evidence, broker faults, compatibility, rollback, and upgrade path; keep credentials and connection URLs out of output; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test pure policy, envelope schema, topology routes, publisher confirms, consumer effects, disposable broker integration, and production probes at distinct layers; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Inspect the Layered Test Strategy trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Layered Test Strategy.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Production Defense
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-production-defense-1je0b9" that uses case 7330 to gate release on contracts, race and leak evidence, broker faults, compatibility, rollback, and upgrade path. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Production Defense.
